preparationNetwork: Allowed only for Docker Official Image pull and npm@12.0.1 during image build; not used by this run operation.

outputTransfer.observedConstraint: A fixed control file existed inside the running container, while docker cp reported it absent; stopped containers lose tmpfs contents.
outputTransfer.fallbackMethod: docker start --attach with one fixed framed JSON bundle, strict relative-path allowlisting, per-file SHA-256 verification, and size limits
